name: bardic-hall
summary: A bardic college or performance hall. Raised stage at one end, rows of benches or seats facing it, instruments on stands between acts, a practice corner with a music stand. Tapestries absorb sound.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: long rectangle — stage at one short end, seating filling the rest

accent.purpose: central carpet runner up the aisle

primary_palette.note: recital hall — lectern for introductions, classical setup
salon hall — intimate, instruments out, chamber performance

story_prompts: grand recital — hall packed, master bard performing, rapt silence
rehearsal — only performers present, instruments being tuned, director pacing
poetry duel — two bards alternating at the lectern, judges at a side table
empty hall after show — petals on the stage, one lute forgotten on a chair

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: warm performance light (0.45) — stage bright, audience dimmer

anti_patterns: stage visible from every seat — don't block sight-lines with pillars centerfloor
central aisle clear — performers and guests need to process
instruments on stands belong near the stage — don't scatter through the audience
